channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Now is your last chance to grab our EXCLUSIVE Surfshark deal — year-low prices with 4 months extra protection included
item.description: There's not long left to grab the best cheap VPN for even cheaper

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Sunday, April 19 (game #777)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Sunday, April 19 (game #1546)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Sunday, April 19 (game #1043)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: 'A mosaic-like pattern': This new ‘Swiss-Army’ optical chip replaces bulky hardware to deliver better, faster broadband
item.description: A mosaic metasurface design integrates eleven optical functions, claiming that controlled disorder can enhance performance and reduce space requirements in optical systems.
